turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Tony's Pizza, Austin. What can I get started for you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, quick question. My kid has celiac. Do you have a gluten-free pizza?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We don't have a gluten-free option on our menu, and I don't want to give unsafe allergy guidance. I can connect you with a person right now to help.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yeah, please. I just want to be careful.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. One sec, I'm transferring you to a person.
